About Sorto Landscaping LLC

12+ years serving Charlotte and surrounding areas

Sorto Landscaping LLC began over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide Charlotte-area residents with superior hardscaping solutions. Founded by seasoned professionals, we recognized a need for reliable contractors who understood the unique challenges of our local climate and soil.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous planning, quality materials, and flawless execution. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations on every project, big or small. We treat every property as if it were our own, ensuring lasting value and satisfaction.

We're proud to be a part of the Charlotte community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local initiatives, and are committed to sustainable practices that protect our environment. When you choose Sorto Landscaping, you're choosing a partner who cares about the future of our city.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Sorto Landscaping LLC

Trusted hardscaping contractor professionals serving Charlotte, NC and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
